children.heading: Erosion control program
children.label: 1 Erosion control program
children.text: The term “erosion control program” means the national shoreline erosion control development and demonstration program established under this section.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Army.

children.heading: Separable element
children.label: 3 Separable element
children.text: The term “separable element” has the meaning provided by .section 2213(f) of this title

children.heading: Shore
children.label: 4 Shore
children.text: The term “shore” includes each shoreline of the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans, the Gulf of Mexico, the Great Lakes, and lakes, estuaries, and bays directly connected therewith.

children.heading: Shore protection project
children.label: 5 Shore protection project
children.text: The term “shore protection project” includes a project for beach nourishment, including the replacement of sand.
